snp500.note: Record territory; closed near 7,369 on May 8. Apr payrolls +115K beat. Earnings bonanza fueling rally (Bloomberg).

nasdaq.note: AI trade took breather but Nvidia pushing past 0B in equity bets (CNBC).

dow.note: Futures rose on US-Iran ceasefire hopes (Benzinga).

bitcoin.note: Targeting 0K in May; Senate Banking Committee crypto bill slated for May 14 vote (CNBC).

gold.note: Spot gold ,715.6/oz on May 9 (GoldPrice.org). Iran war + Fed uncertainty supporting safe haven.

wti_crude.note: Iran war draining oil buffer at unprecedented pace (Bloomberg). Oil execs discuss permanent energy market changes (CNBC).

brent_crude.note: UK moves warship to Middle East for Hormuz mission (Bloomberg).

dxy.note: Dollar supported by oil-driven inflation, Fed stalemate on rates.
